properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v1 v1 v3 v3 v1 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Shout Hallelujah Shout Hallelujah Shout Hallelujah Unto the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sing aloud to God Let the people Come before His throne Hallelujah Sing aloud to God Make a joyfull Noise unto the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: From the ends of the Earth, From the depths of the sea, Let all creation praise His name
